description: Vault gas environment presets for 3B subsystem-depth modeling. 3B-spec §10.1.

presets.label: Hard Vacuum (No Gas Environment)
presets.notes: Default hard-vacuum assumption. No gas convection contribution to resistance chain.

presets.label: Trace Gas Fill — Convection Disabled
presets.notes: Trace gas presence acknowledged but convection contribution not modeled. Operator must override if convection is relevant.

presets.label: Low-Pressure Nitrogen — Fixed-h Convection
presets.notes: Conservative low-pressure nitrogen fill with nominal convection assumption. Override h and area for site-specific conditions.
